title: Copper Complex
description: An altered progression system that implements copper tools and armor sets to the game.
body:
## A datapack made for people who want to spruce up they're minecraft progression!

- Gear up with copper armor and copper tools
- Works with Valiance, just make sure its above it on your datapacks.

Adds new copper tools and weapons.
Adds new copper armor.
Adds Valiance tools, just make sure Copper Complex is above valiance.
Allows wooden pickaxes to mine coal and copper.
Removes stone tier tools and weapons.
Iron Ore/Raw Iron smelts into nuggets.
4 iron nuggets converts into an iron ingot and vice versa.
